creator: vittorio.demartino@terna.it
text:
# portupgrade libgnome
...........................................................
/bin/sh /usr/ports/x11/libgnome/work/gnome-libtool --mode=link cc -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=pentium4 -L/usr/local/lib -o libgnome-2.la -rpath /usr/local/lib -version-info 1600:0:1600 -no-undefined -export-symbols-regex "^[^_].*" libgnometypebuiltins.lo gnome-config.lo gnome-sound.lo gnome-triggers.lo gnome-program.lo gnome-help.lo gnome-exec.lo gnome-gconf.lo gnome-i18n.lo gnome-url.lo gnome-util.lo gnome-score.lo gnome-init.lo  -Wl,--export-dynamic -pthread -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/X11R6/lib -lgnomevfs-2 -lbonobo-2 -lbonobo-activation -lgmodule-2.0 -lgconf-2 -lORBit-2 -lgthread-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -liconv -lesd -laudiofile -lm   -lpopt -L/usr/local/lib
grep: /usr/X11R6/lib/libgconf-2.la: No such file or directory
sed: /usr/X11R6/lib/libgconf-2.la: No such file or directory
gnome-libtool: link: `/usr/X11R6/lib/libgconf-2.la' is not a valid libtool archive
gmake[3]: *** [libgnome-2.la] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11/libgnome/work/libgnome-2.16.0/libgnome'
gmake[2]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11/libgnome/work/libgnome-2.16.0/libgnome'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11/libgnome/work/libgnome-2.16.0'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 2
....................................................

Fix: 

applied the following patch **before** starting portupgrade

# ln -s /usr/local/lib/libgconf-2.la /usr/X11R6/lib/libgconf-2.la
How-To-Repeat: # portupgrade libgnome
